experience.title: Guest Faculty
experience.description: Taught Data Structures & Algorithms and Machine Learning while supporting academic coordination for the 3rd-year batch.
highlights: Taught Data Structures and Algorithms to 2nd year B.Tech students and Machine Learning to 3rd year students
Prepared coding assignments and sessional exam papers covering theoretical and practical aspects
Started a weekly LeetCode session to build regular problem-solving habits
Handled scheduling and coordination for the 3rd-year batch throughout the semester

experience.title: Front-end Intern
experience.description: Built and maintained responsive web interfaces for dynamic web applications.
highlights: Built and maintained responsive web interfaces for dynamic web applications
Worked on frontend features using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and jQuery
Used AJAX for asynchronous frontend–backend communication, reducing page reloads
Assisted with debugging reported issues and UI fixes based on feedback

experience.title: Python Internship
experience.description: Structured Python programming internship covering core concepts and OOP.
highlights: Completed a structured Python programming internship covering core language concepts and OOP
Built various projects applying concepts learned throughout the program
Gained hands-on experience writing clean, modular Python code through regular assignments

projects.name: Fake News Detection System
projects.type: Research Paper (Bachelor's Final Year Project & Research Publication)
projects.domain: Natural Language Processing, Text Classification, Machine Learning
projects.description: Designed and implemented the Python-based machine learning backend for a fake news detection system.
features: Performed manual data collection of real-world fake and true news articles with extensive preprocessing
Applied TF-IDF vectorization for text representation
Trained and evaluated Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Gradient Boosting, and Random Forest
Conducted comparative performance analysis using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score

projects.name: Multilingual Translation & Transliteration System
projects.type: Minor in Artificial Intelligence – Final Assignment
projects.description: End-to-end multilingual NLP system supporting translation across five languages using transformer-based models.
features: Translation across English, Hindi, Japanese, Chinese, and Russian using pre-trained transformer models
Implemented training, inference, and testing workflows for multilingual text processing
Integrated speech-to-text and text-to-speech for a multimodal text and audio pipeline
Deployed an interactive Streamlit interface for real-time translation, transliteration, and speech processing

education.details: Multidisciplinary AI program covering machine learning, deep learning, NLP, and applied language systems.
B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering.

achievements: Participated in the 7th Fujairah International Taekwondo Championship (2019)
National Medalist in Taekwondo — 2 Gold, 1 Silver (2015, 2017, 2018)
